name: Domestic Data Protection & Privacy
description: Domestic regulations governing the collection, use, storage, and processing of personal data within the country, including cybersecurity obligations.
scoring_note: Score 0 = low compliance cost (open/adequate framework). Score 1 = high compliance cost (heavy obligations or absence of key protections). Absence of key legal framework also scores > 0.

indicators.name: Lack of comprehensive legal framework for data protection
indicators.description: Absence of a comprehensive, dedicated personal data protection law. Inverse indicator — a strong law = lower score.

scoring_guide.0.0: Country has a comprehensive, dedicated data protection law covering all sectors.
scoring_guide.0.5: Country has partial or sector-specific data protection rules but no unified law.
scoring_guide.1.0: No dedicated data protection legislation exists.

indicators.name: Minimum period of data retention requirements
indicators.description: Mandatory minimum periods for which data must be retained, adding compliance cost for businesses.

scoring_guide.0.0: No mandatory minimum retention period — businesses decide retention based on purpose.
scoring_guide.0.5: Minimum retention period required for specific sectors (e.g. financial, telecoms) only.
scoring_guide.1.0: Broad mandatory minimum retention period applies across sectors.

indicators.name: Data Impact Assessment or Data Protection Officer requirements
indicators.description: Mandatory DPIA or DPO requirements impose compliance obligations on businesses handling personal data.

scoring_guide.0.5: DPIA or DPO required only for high-risk processing or large-scale controllers.
scoring_guide.1.0: DPIA and DPO both mandatory for broad categories of data controllers.

indicators.name: Requirements to allow Government access to personal data
indicators.description: Obligations on private entities to provide government agencies with access to personal data, beyond standard law enforcement processes.

scoring_guide.0.0: Government access only through standard judicial/legal process with oversight.
scoring_guide.0.5: Government access permitted for national security or public interest with some procedural safeguards.
scoring_guide.1.0: Broad government access rights with minimal procedural safeguards or oversight.
